title: StoreShield Risky Frameworks
description: Schema for risky_frameworks.yaml — curated tracking/risky SDKs plus Apple's required-manifest SDK list.

risky_frameworks.description: Curated framework/SDK names that may indicate tracking, attribution, analytics, or ad-network behavior.

required_manifest_sdks.description: Apple's official SDK names that must include PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy and signature when submitted in App Store Connect.
